allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } }; Start-Sleep 2; "port 3000 cleared")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } }; "test server stopped")

Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; im=Image.open\('src/public/img/logo.png'\); print\('logo',im.mode,im.size\); print\('corner',im.getpixel\(\(0,0\)\)\); im2=Image.open\('src/public/img/favicon.png'\); print\('fav',im2.mode,im2.size,im2.getpixel\(\(0,0\)\)\)")
PowerShell(try { Resolve-DnsName "_railway-verify.ziyo.autoauction.kr" -Type TXT -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Strings } catch { "TXT not resolving: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object {$_.Status -eq 'Up'} | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize)
